history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An advertisement-style graphic promotes “ALIGHTH” motion features with several Indonesian text callouts and bold price-related messaging.

Main Subject:
The central focus is a stylized banner layout with large headline text reading “ALIGHT MOTION” and a prominent circular badge on the right reading “1 TAHUN FULL AKTIF PRO,” along with multiple rectangular panels listing features and benefits.

Setting:
The scene is entirely a digital, graphic design composition with a dark background and neon green, yellow, and blue accents; no real-world environment is visible.

Visual Details:
The design uses a dark, high-contrast background with glowing neon effects. “ALIGHT” appears in large white, italicized block letters, while “MOTION” is displayed in bright neon green with a layered glow. On the left, there is a rounded square icon with a circular wireless-like symbol in green. A crown icon appears near the center-left. In the middle, a bright yellow-orange badge contains the text “MURAH BANGET!” in very large stylized letters, with smaller text beneath it. Surrounding shapes include starbursts and lightning icons in yellow and green. On the bottom area, there are three separate neon-colored rounded rectangles: a shopping cart icon and text on the left, a lightning icon with text in the center, and an order button-like panel on the right. The overall composition is centered and stacked with multiple sections, and the camera angle appears straight-on as a flat poster graphic.

Visible Text:
Shopee
ALIGHT MOTION
DURASI
1 TAHUN
FULL AKTIF
PRO
AKUN AMAN & STABIL
KEUNGGULAN
Versi premium full fitur!
Akses FULL FITUR PRO
Tanpa Watermark
Bisa Export HD / 4K 60fps
Semua Fitur Premium Terbuka
Aman, Stabil & No Banned
Cocok untuk Editor Pemula & Pro
HARGA
MURAH BANGET!
KUALITAS PREMIUM, HARGA BERSAHABAT!
AMaN & TERPERCAYA
GARANSI JIKA AKUN BERMASALAH
FAST RESPON CHAT DIBALAS CEPAT
BANYAK TESTI PELANGGAN PUAS
LANGSUNG KIRIM SETELAH PEMBAYARAN
PRO TANPA RIBET, HASIL EDIT MAKIN KEREN!
ORDER SEKARANG STOK TERBATAS!

Practical Summary:
The image is a neon-themed promotional graphic for “ALIGHT MOTION” highlighting a “PRO” offering with “1 TAHUN FULL AKTIF.” It lists feature and guarantee claims in multiple panels and includes calls to order immediately with “STOK TERBATAS.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Structured Version

## Branding

- Alight Motion

## Package / Duration

- FULL AKTIF  
- VERSI PREMIUM FULL FITUR!  
- PRO

- BANGEt!

## Aman & Terpercaya

## Callouts

- PRO TANPA RIBET, — HASIL EDIT MAKIN KEREN!  
- ORDER SEKARANG — STOK TERBATAS!  

# Notes
- The phrase “BANGEt!” appears with mixed capitalization as shown in the screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A vibrant, eye-catching digital advertisement for Alight Motion Pro software, presented in a vertical poster format. The background is a dark, dynamic gradient transitioning from deep black to dark teal, with abstract, glowing green and electric blue streaks and particles that suggest energy and digital motion.

Dominating the center is the Alight Motion logo, a stylized, swirling abstract design in shades of light blue and green, enclosed in a dark square icon with rounded corners and a subtle glow. To the right of the logo, large, bold, white text reads "ALIGHT MOTION", with "MOTION" in a striking, luminous green. Below this, in a smaller, yellow banner with a slight sheen, is the text "VERSI PREMIUM FULL FITUR!". To the far right of "MOTION", a prominent, rounded, green badge boldly declares "PRO".

A large, circular graphic on the upper right highlights "DURASI" (Duration) in a yellow banner. Inside the circle, the number "1" is rendered in thick, white, sans-serif font, followed by the text "TAHUN" (Year) in white, and "FULL AKTIF" (Fully Active) in smaller white text below. A green banner underneath this reads "AKUN AMAN & STABIL" (Account Safe & Stable).

Below the main title, a large, attention-grabbing banner in bright orange and yellow screams "HARGA MURAH BANGET!" (Very Cheap Price!). The word "HARGA" is in an orange rectangle at the top, and "MURAH BANGET!" is in large, bold, yellow text with a red outline and a subtle green shadow, giving it a 3D effect. Beneath this, a smaller green banner states "KUALITAS PREMIUM, HARGA BERSAHABAT!" (Premium Quality, Friendly Price!).

To the left, a section titled "KEUNGGULAN" (Advantages) is presented in a dark teal box with a thin green border. Underneath this title, a bulleted list details the benefits: "Akses FULL FITUR PRO" (Access FULL PRO Features), "Tanpa Watermark" (Without Watermark), "Bisa Export HD / 4K 60fps" (Can Export HD / 4K 60fps), "Semua Fitur Premium Terbuka" (All Premium Features Unlocked), "Aman, Stabil & No Banned" (Safe, Stable & No Banned), and "Cocok untuk Editor Pemula & Pro" (Suitable for Beginner & Pro Editors). Each point is marked with a green checkmark.

On the bottom left, a shopping cart icon is next to the text "LANGSUNG KIRIM SETELAH PEMBAYARAN" (Direct Delivery After Payment). On the bottom center, a lightning bolt icon is paired with "PRO TANPA RIBET, HASIL EDIT MAKIN KEREN!" (PRO Without Hassle, Editing Results Cooler!). On the bottom right, another shopping cart icon is next to a bright green button that says "ORDER SEKARANG STOK TERBATAS!" (Order Now Limited Stock!).

To the right of the "MURAH BANGET!" banner, a section labeled "AMAN & TERPERCAYA" (Safe & Trusted) features a shield icon. Below this are three points with icons: a checkmark for "GARANSI JIKA AKUN BERMASALAH" (Warranty If Account Has Problems), headphones for "FAST RESPON CHAT DIBALAS CEPAT" (Fast Response Chat Replied Quickly), and a thumbs-up for "BANYAK TESTI PELANGGAN PUAS" (Many Satisfied Customer Testimonials).

The overall style is bold, modern, and energetic, with a strong emphasis on digital aesthetics. The color palette is dominated by dark backgrounds contrasted with bright, neon-like greens, blues, yellows, and oranges, creating a high-contrast and stimulating visual experience. The lighting appears to be internal to the graphics, with glowing effects and subtle shadows enhancing the 3D feel. The mood is exciting, persuasive, and trustworthy, aiming to attract users to purchase the Alight Motion Pro software.
